blocks.text: This slice moves the provider-neutral C4/C5 runtime actor.

items: Public CI for mailbox, slot, cancellation, heartbeat, capability reconciliation, detected fingerprint, and protocol-driver handoff

blocks.text: The runtime actor owns one mailbox actor per runtime/capability boundary, reconciles adapter detection into public C3 contracts capability facts, enforces slots, starts one-run sessions, cascades cancellation, and publishes status/heartbeat snapshots.
This slice does not move supervisor, controlplane, concrete adapters, task DB/project/local API packages, packaging, infra, secrets, or local machine state.
